tasks.label: Stop backend on 8082
args: $listener = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8082 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($listener) { Stop-Process -Id $listener.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Output ('Stopped backend process ' + $listener.OwningProcess) } else { Write-Output 'No backend process listening on 8082' }
